query_text: a confidence-inspiring ski for someone who skis fast but wants to feel safe

results.explanation: Volkl Mantra M6 excels in: stability_at_speed. Review: "incredibly stable at any speed." Review: "Incredibly stable in chop, crud, wind-blown garbage — it just plows through everything."
K2 Mindbender 108Ti excels in: stability_at_speed. Review: "Incredibly stable." Review: "and incredibly stable at speed."
Dynastar M-Free 108 excels in: stability_at_speed. Review: "stable in variable conditions." Review: "Stable enough for speed, playful enough for tight spots."
Solid on: stability_at_speed. Review: "Not as stable as heavier chargers in high-speed chop." Review: "Versatile freeride ski that handles most conditions well."

ground_truth.reason: Stability 8, damp 8, forgiveness 4 — strong but not punishing, 'confidence' in reviews
Stability 9, damp 9 — maximum composure but forgiveness only 3, expert-only
Stability 8, damp 8 — 'confidence-inspiring' in reviews, reasonable forgiveness
Stability 9, damp 9, forgiveness 3 — clinical but demanding
Stability 7, damp 7, forgiveness 5 — safe feeling, moderate speed capability
